name: gitlab-mr-guardian
description: Monitors approved GitLab merge requests, safely rebases stale branches, enables auto-merge, and reports CI failures.

hostname.title: GitLab hostname
hostname.description: GitLab host used by glab. Leave empty to infer it from the current repository remote.

poll_interval_seconds.title: Polling interval
poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between GitLab checks while Claude Code is running.

auto_rebase.title: Automatic rebase
auto_rebase.description: Rebase eligible MRs only when GitLab reports need_rebase and approval safety checks pass.

auto_merge.title: Automatic merge
auto_merge.description: Request GitLab auto-merge for eligible MRs after all guarded checks pass.

trigger_pipeline_when_missing_or_skipped.title: Refresh skipped pipelines
trigger_pipeline_when_missing_or_skipped.description: Create a new MR pipeline when a monitored MR has no current pipeline or its pipeline was skipped.

max_mr_age_days.title: MR age limit
max_mr_age_days.description: Only handle MRs updated within this many days. Use 0 to disable the limit.

report_ci_failures.title: Report CI failures
report_ci_failures.description: Notify Claude when CI fails for a monitored MR without retrying it automatically.
